name: jelly-guild
description: Subagent registry for /goal-shaped projects under the jelly substrate family. Three-axis decomposition (personality HOW + domain WHAT + phase WHEN): 5 personality subagents (skeptic, methodical, generative, pragmatist, synthesizer) read 5 domain + 4 phase mode files at dispatch time to construct their identity per task. Paired domain rubrics expose the same content to Outcomes-callable auto-provisioned graders. A project-scoped CLAUDE.md template carries substrate posture to /goal's lead agent and dispatched fleet via @-import composition.
